steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The slope of the line of best fit equals the rate of temperature change per hour. Read two points from the line, $(0,175)$ and $(10,575)$, then use Desmos to fit a line.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: $$\text{slope} = \frac{575 - 175}{10 - 0} = \frac{400}{10} = 40 \text{ °F per hour}$$The slope is positive, so temperature increases at 40°F per hour.
